implementationPatterns.description: Custom property definition. The implementation of a CSS variable (--name: value) that can be referenced with var(--name).
Selector rule implementation. The full rule block that defines styles for a given selector, including all property declarations.
@keyframes implementation. The full animation definition including all keyframe stops (from/to or percentage-based).
@font-face implementation. The full font declaration including family name, sources, weight ranges, and display strategy.
@layer implementation. The full cascade layer block containing all rules assigned to this layer.
@counter-style implementation. Defines a custom counter style with system, symbols, and suffix descriptors.
@property (Houdini) implementation. Registers a custom property with syntax, inherits, and initial-value descriptors.
@media implementation. The full media query block containing conditional styles for specific device/viewport conditions.
@supports implementation. The full feature query block containing styles applied only if the browser supports the tested feature.
@container implementation. The full container query block containing styles applied based on container element size.
